name: Checkered Kids' Bath Rug - Pillowfort™
description: Bring a pop of color to their bath space with this Checkered Bath Rug from Pillowfort™. This medium-pile bath rug is made from 100% tufted cotton fabric to feel soft and  provide cozy comfort underfoot. Showcasing a multicolor checkered print, it's sure to add fun style to their bathroom decor.
